name: Cross-Exchange Arb Scanner
description: Detect and execute price differences across connected exchanges
prerequisites: Two or more exchanges connected via /setup
Paper mode enabled on all exchanges
workflow: 1. Ask the arbitrageur to scan all exchanges for BTC and ETH price differences
2. The arbitrageur reports spreads in basis points with execution feasibility
3. Ask risk-manager to size the trade based on portfolio limits
4. Ask execution-trader to plan the two-leg execution (buy on cheap venue, sell on expensive)
5. Review the plan, then confirm execution
expected_output: Spread report with bps, venue names, fill probability, and net profit after fees
failure_modes: Spread too small to cover fees → arbitrageur will flag this
Insufficient balance on one venue → risk-manager blocks the trade
High latency → execution-trader warns about slippage risk
